_doc: LOAD-BEARING: Per-residue full topology for the 20 canonical AAs (+ UNK). Extracted from ~/.boltz/mols/<RES>.pkl (RDKit Mol pickles downloaded by Boltz's first-run cache). Atom order matches the CCD canonical order — this is the order the upstream Boltz featurizer iterates, so feats output will only match if the TS port preserves it. For internal residues, drop atoms with leaving=true; for C-terminal residue, keep them. center_atom_idx is Cα (use for ribbon coord extraction); disto_atom_idx is Cβ (distogram input only — see P-9).
